CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(Flosum__Type__c) == 'pre', IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsManualStep/preStep.png', 'pre step', 30, 127), IF( TEXT(Flosum__Type__c) == 'post', IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsManualStep/postStep.png', 'post step', 30, 127), TEXT(Flosum__Type__c) ) )
CustomField.label: Type
